nasb.text: I saw a dream and it made me fearful; and these fantasies as I lay on my bed and the visions in my mind kept alarming me.

esv.text: I saw a dream that made me afraid. As I lay in bed the fancies and the visions of my head alarmed me.

cnv.text: 我作了一個夢，這夢使我懼怕；我在床上所見的夢幻和我腦海中出現的異象，都使我驚惶。

ccb.text: 但我做了一个梦，令我害怕。我躺在床上的时候，脑中出现的情景和异象使我恐惧。
